projectDescription: A minimal tensor processing unit (TPU) hardware design inspired by Google's TPU V2 and V1
keyFeatures: 2x2 systolic array with processing elements for matrix multiplication
Vector processing unit with bias, activation, and loss functions
Dual-port unified buffer for storing matrices and intermediate values
94-bit instruction set architecture for TPU control
Support for forward and backward propagation in neural networks
Fixed-point arithmetic for efficient hardware implementation
Gradient descent with configurable learning rate
Comprehensive testing framework using cocotb and iverilog
publicApiSurface: tpu - Top-level TPU module with configurable systolic array width
pe - Processing Element performing multiply-accumulate operations
systolic - 2D systolic array for matrix operations
vpu - Vector Processing Unit with configurable data pathways
unified_buffer - Dual-port memory buffer with read/write ports
control_unit - Instruction decoder for 94-bit instruction format
bias_parent - Bias addition module in VPU pipeline
leaky_relu_parent - Leaky ReLU activation function module
leaky_relu_derivative_parent - Leaky ReLU derivative for backpropagation
gradient_descent - Weight update module with learning rate control
